creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
This is driving me totally insane.

The first 4 times I ran the tester, it had IFDISABLED.

The next like 50 times, nothing...  not sure what else is need to trigger it - I ran a few openvpn instances in between ("if it's related to additional configs, like routing changes") but that doesn't trigger it either.
